spec: Holo Hub Phase 2b audio: the BBB audio as a lossless FLAC κ-object streams chunk by chunk; each re-derives to its declared κ (L5) before decode; persists in the OpfsKappaStore; Web Audio decodes it (48kHz stereo); a deterministic OfflineAudioContext render through an HRTF panner proves binaural spatial output. Lossless FLAC; source master is AAC (lossless-of-a-lossy-source).
